findings.issue: ZH inconsistency: する rendered as '进行' in row1 but '执行' in row2 for same column
findings.detail: Row1 col2 ZH='进行', row2 col2 ZH='执行' both translate JP='する' in column 'クライアント側でデータ表示'. Inconsistent within same table.
findings.fix: Standardize: use '执行' throughout or '进行' throughout for する in this table.

findings.issue: ZH surface '单工系统' may conflict with simplex communication mode (単工通信) terminology
findings.detail: 単工系统 in Chinese may be confused with simplex transmission direction (一方向通信). Some CN IT exam materials use '单机系统' instead for シンプレックスシステム (single-computer configuration). Needs domain expert review for target-audience clarity.
findings.fix: Consider '单机系统' or clarify in ZH definition that this refers to single-computer configuration, not simplex comms.

findings.issue: ZH surface assignment INVERTS standard Chinese IT terminology for デュプレックス vs デュアル
findings.detail: In Chinese IT education: デュプレックスシステム (duplex, standby) = 双工系统; デュアルシステム (dual, parallel checking) = 双重系统. This pipeline assigned デュプレックス=双联系统 and デュアル=双工系统, which inverts the standard. 双工 (duplex) in Chinese unambiguously refers to two-way/dual-channel operation matching デュプレックス, not デュアル.
findings.fix: Reassign: デュプレックスシステム→双工系统 (or 热备用系统); デュアルシステム→双重系统 (or 双机系统).

findings.issue: ZH surface '双工系统' is wrong term for デュアルシステム (dual parallel-checking system)
findings.detail: 双工 (duplex) in Chinese means two-way simultaneous communication/operation, which maps to デュプレックス not デュアル. デュアルシステム should be 双重系统 or 双机系统.
findings.fix: Change ZH surface to '双重系统' or '双机容错系统'. See paired finding on p374::1.

findings.issue: ZH surface '双联系统' inherited incorrect terminology from p374 — same FAIL as p374::1
findings.detail: Repeat instance of デュプレックスシステム ZH=双联系统 terminological error (see p374::1 finding).
findings.fix: Same fix: change to 双工系统 or 热备用系统.

findings.issue: ZH surface '双工系统' inherited incorrect terminology from p374 — same FAIL as p374::2
findings.detail: Repeat instance of デュアルシステム ZH=双工系统 terminological error (see p374::2 finding).
findings.fix: Same fix: change to 双重系统 or 双机系统.

findings.issue: ZH level-column cells inconsistently elaborate: some rows add full Chinese names, others use plain 'RAID N'
findings.detail: RAID 0='RAID 0', RAID 1='磁盘阵列1级（RAID 1，镜像）', RAID 2='磁盘阵列2级（RAID 2）', RAID 5='RAID 5', RAID 6='磁盘阵列6（RAID 6）'. Inconsistent formatting within same table column — learner may be confused about which levels have Chinese names.
findings.fix: Standardize: either all cells use 'RAID N' or all cells add the Chinese elaboration.

findings.issue: Two separate term entries (応答時間 p379::2 and レスポンスタイム p379::3) share identical ZH and EN surfaces
findings.detail: Both ZH surface = '响应时间', both EN surface = 'Response Time'. Learner cannot distinguish between the two entries by surface alone. Should differentiate: 応答時間=响应时间, レスポンスタイム=响应时间（レスポンスタイム）or note katakana variant.
findings.fix: Add parenthetical to レスポンスタイム entry: ZH='响应时间（レスポンスタイム音译）', EN='Response Time (Katakana: レスポンスタイム)'.

findings.issue: Table TCO row first cell has prefix 'コスト/成本/Cost' before the term label in all three languages
findings.detail: JP='コスト TCO（Total Cost of Ownership）', ZH='成本 总拥有成本（TCO）', EN='Cost TCO (Total Cost of Ownership)'. The 'コスト/成本/Cost' prefix appears to be a residual table category label bleeding into the term cell — inconsistent with other rows (which just have the term name).
findings.fix: Clean table cell to just 'TCO（Total Cost of Ownership）'/'总拥有成本（TCO）'/'TCO (Total Cost of Ownership)'.

summary: Chunk 36 (pp.372-381) covers system configurations (client-server, thin client, simplex/duplex/dual), RAID (0-6), NAS, system performance metrics (response time, benchmark), cost indicators (TCO), and reliability (MTBF). All 45 entities are structurally complete with no missing fields. Glossary surface alignment: 0 mismatches. 4 FAIL findings — all in ZH, all Lens C (terminology accuracy): デュプレックスシステム is rendered as '双联系统' and デュアルシステム as '双工系统', which INVERTS standard Chinese IT terminology (双工 = duplex/two-way = デュプレックス, not デュアル). This systematic error repeats on both p374 and p375 (4 FAIL total). 5 WARN findings: inconsistent ZH verb choice within table p372::5 (する as '进行' vs '执行'); RAID level table ZH cells inconsistently elaborated; 単工系統 ZH borderline with simplex comms term; duplicate Response Time entries with identical ZH/EN surfaces; TCO table cell has residual category-label prefix. EN content: 0 issues. JP content: 0 issues. Release impact: FAIL findings block release for ZH audience on duplex/dual terminology.
